qa_pairs.question: Which specific software modules are loaded for the Intel compiler environment when configuring the Community Earth System Model (CESM) on the Fir machine?
qa_pairs.answer: When configuring CESM on the Fir machine with the Intel compiler, the following modules are loaded: `intel/2023.2.1`, `git-annex/10.20231129`, and `cmake/3.27.7`.

qa_pairs.question: What environment variables are explicitly set for CESM on the Fir machine, and what are their values?
qa_pairs.answer: For CESM on the Fir machine, the following environment variables are set: `NETCDF_PATH` to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v4/MPI/intel2023/openmpi4/pnetcdf/1.12.3`, `NETCDF_FORTRAN_PATH` to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v4/MPI/intel2023/openmpi4/netcdf-fortran-mpi/4.6.1/`, `NETCDF_C_PATH` to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v4/MPI/intel2023/openmpi4/netcdf-c++4-mpi/4.3.1/`, `NETLIB_LAPACK_PATH` to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v3/Core/imkl/2023.2.0/mkl/2023.2.0/`, `OMP_STACKSIZE` to `256M`, `I_MPI_CC` to `icc`, `I_MPI_FC` to `ifort`, `I_MPI_F77` to `ifort`, `I_MPI_F90` to `ifort`, and `I_MPI_CXX` to `icpc`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum stack limit configured for CESM on the Fir machine?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum stack limit (`RLIMIT_STACK`) configured for CESM on the Fir machine is 300,000,000.
